docs.text: Welcome to CASTLE Docs This is the official documentation for all AU CASTLE Lab services and practices. Planned Categories Lab Practices - Meeting agendas, governance, etc. Lab Equipment - An inventory of equipment, with detailed pages as needed. Lab PC Build - How to prepare and deploy the Linux image used on lab workstations. Server Setup - How to set up and maintain services including LDAP, PLA, Docs, NFS, Docker images, etc.
docs.title: Home
